description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-06-21T20:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 22 June 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p.m. and 7:30 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a.m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a.m. is cancelled
2026-06-21T20:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年6⽉22⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 23 June 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p.m. and 7:30 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a.m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a.m. is cancelled.

-中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運

「⾺灣-荃灣」航線：
-⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次
-荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次。

2026-07-02T22:30:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR), with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2026-07-02T22:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2026-07-03T12:10:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to strong wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge, with details as shown below:
(i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge are lowered from 100km/h to 50 km/h; and
(ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge is lowered from 80km/h to 50 km/h.
2026-07-03T12:10:00.CONTENT_CN:
由於強風，港珠澳大橋主橋已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排：
(i)港珠澳大橋主橋的快線及中線車速限制由每小時100公里降至每小時50 公里；及
(ii)港珠澳大橋主橋的慢線車速限制由每小時80公里降至每小時50 公里。

2026-07-04T14:45:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge: (i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge has resumed 100 km/h; and (ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge has resumed 80km/h.
2026-07-04T14:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋主橋已實施以下安排： (i)港珠澳大橋主橋的快線及中線車速限制恢復為每小時100公里；及 (ii)港珠澳大橋主橋的慢線車速限制恢復為每小時80公里。

2026-07-03T12:41:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to strong wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR), with details as shown below:
The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2026-07-03T12:41:00.CONTENT_CN:
由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排：
港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2026-07-03T13:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR): The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.
2026-07-03T13:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路最高車速限制恢復為每小時100 公里。

2026-07-03T14:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-07-03T14:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

2026-07-03T15:02:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Light Rail service near Leung King Stop is suspended because of a fallen tree. Please consider using other transport.

Please allow more time for travel.
2026-07-03T15:02:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，受塌樹影響，良景站附近的輕鐵服務暫停。請考慮使用其他交通工具。

請為行程預留充裕時間。

2026-07-03T15:23:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Light Rail service is disrupted because of a fallen tree near Leung King Stop. Light Rail service is diverted as follows: Route 505 towards Sam Shing will not stop between Ching Chung and San Wai stops; Route 507 will not stop between San Wai and Tin King stops; Route 615 and Route 615P towards Tuen Mun Ferry Pier will not stop between Ching Chung and San Wai stops. A free MTR Shuttle Bus service is running between Tuen Mun and Siu Hong.
2026-07-03T15:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 受塌樹影響，良景站附近的輕鐵服務受阻。輕鐵路綫改道如下： 505綫往三聖方向不停青松站至新圍站； 507綫不停新圍站至田景站； 615綫及615P綫往屯門碼頭方向不停青松站至新圍站。 港鐵已安排免費接駁巴士，來往屯門及兆康。

2026-07-03T15:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that the fallen tree near Leung King Stop has been cleared. Light Rail service is gradually resuming.
2026-07-03T15:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，良景站附近的塌樹已清理，輕鐵服務逐步回復正常。

2026-07-04T11:15:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification, due to weather condition, the following kaito ferry service has been suspended.
Yun Lee Marine Holdings Limited
Tseung Kwan O (South) - Sai Wan Ho.
2026-07-04T11:15:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲通知，因天氣關係，以下街渡渡輪服務已經暫停服務。
潤利海事控股有限公司
將軍澳（南）—西灣河。

2026-07-04T14:05:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification, due to weather condition, the following ferry / kaito ferry service(s) has been suspended.
Tsui Wah Ferry Service (H.K.) Limited
Po Toi Island - Stanley - Aberdeen: service to Stanley suspends
Yun Lee Marine Holdings Limited
Tseung Kwan O (South) - Sai Wan Ho.
2026-07-04T14:05:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲通知，因天氣關係，以下渡輪/街渡服務已經暫停服務。
翠華船務（香港）有限公司
蒲台島—赤柱—香港仔：不停赤柱
潤利海事控股有限公司
將軍澳（南）—西灣河。
